test: one-sided two-proportion (z-approx for planning; Fisher's exact for the small-N primary readout)

cells_per_condition_guidance.noise_model: per-gene SE = |m1-m2|/2 from a random cell split-half; SE ∝ 1/sqrt(N_cells)
cells_per_condition_guidance.requirement: match Norman per-condition depth; do not drop below ~0.64x it (N/gamma*^2 at the median certificate)
cells_per_condition_guidance.hard_floor: >=12 cells/condition (min_cells_per_half=6) to form a split-half SE at all
cells_per_condition_guidance.status: DESIGN guidance from the substrate noise model + sensitivity curve; absolute Norman cell counts are NOT in the substrate
